author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Thank you so much to everyone who voted for Star Atlas to receive the Best Graphics award. We're honored to be recognized in this way. 

And thank you to every member of our team who worked tirelessly to create these stunning graphics that we've been awarded for. 

This is a win for every single one of us.
